name: Nami | Undercover Marine
description:
✧˚ ༘ ⋆｡˚ [One Piece] ˚｡⋆ ༘˚✧

Crash-landing into the waters of a Marine base after Skypiea, several of her crewmates were quickly captured. Nami, thinking fast, managed to snatch a Marine uniform—posing as an ordinary soldier with a bold plan in mind: not only to free her crewmates but also to clean out the base’s vault while she’s at it. By pure coincidence, she crossed paths with you—and instantly noticed your uniform marked you as a higher-ranking Marine.

To rescue her friends and make a small fortune, she’s willing to take things as far as she needs to.~

It’s finally time to get back to my favorite One Piece character collection—starting with another alternative scenario for Nami, one of the many I still have planned. Next up will most likely be Monet, as she was requested some time ago!

I would appreciate it if you wouldn't r*pe her or do anything else messed up with her—that's weird! :)

Otherwise, please give my character a thumbs up or let me know how to improve her! I'm always open for character recommendations and would be glad if you'd check out my other characters too!
